languages.text: {n}А потом на нижних уровнях корневой системы Заркова впервые за века стало светло. Взрыв разорвал изнутри гробницу, разнес на куски многие корни и поджег еще больше.{/n}

{n}And then, for the first time in centuries, the deepest levels of Zarkov's root system were flooded with light. The explosion ripped apart the tomb from the inside, blasting many of the roots to pieces and setting still more ablaze.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}А потом на нижних уровнях корневой системы Заркова впервые за века стало светло. Взрыв разорвал изнутри гробницу, разнес на куски многие корни и поджег еще больше.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}And then, for the first time in centuries, the deepest levels of Zarkov's root system were flooded with light. The explosion ripped apart the tomb from the inside, blasting many of the roots to pieces and setting still more ablaze.{/n}

{n}And then, for the first time in centuries, the deepest levels of Zarkov's root system were flooded with light. The explosion ripped apart the tomb from the inside, blasting many of the roots to pieces and setting still more ablaze.{/n}

{n}And then, for the first time in centuries, the deepest levels of Zarkov's root system were flooded with light. The explosion ripped apart the tomb from the inside, blasting many of the roots to pieces and setting still more ablaze.{/n}

languages.text: {n}そして、何世紀にも渡って初めて、ザルコフの根の最深部が光に照らされた。爆発は墓を内部から引き裂き、多くの根を粉々に砕き、さらに多くの根を燃え上がらせた。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}And then, for the first time in centuries, the deepest levels of Zarkov's root system were flooded with light. The explosion ripped apart the tomb from the inside, blasting many of the roots to pieces and setting still more ablaze.{/n}

traits.locale_text: そして、何世紀にも渡って初めて、ザルコフの根の最深部が光に照らされた。爆発は墓を内部から引き裂き、多くの根を粉々に砕き、さらに多くの根を燃え上がらせた。

languages.text: {n}Entonces, por primera vez en siglos, los lugares más profundos del sistema de raíces de Zarkov se llenaron de luz. La explosión arrasó la tumba desde el interior, haciendo pedazos numerosas raíces y prendiendo fuego a otras muchas.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}And then, for the first time in centuries, the deepest levels of Zarkov's root system were flooded with light. The explosion ripped apart the tomb from the inside, blasting many of the roots to pieces and setting still more ablaze.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Entonces, por primera vez en siglos, los lugares más profundos del sistema de raíces de Zarkov se llenaron de luz. La explosión arrasó la tumba desde el interior, haciendo pedazos numerosas raíces y prendiendo fuego a otras muchas.{/n}

languages.text: {n}接着，数个世纪以来的第一次，扎尔科夫最深层的根系被光芒淹没。爆炸从内部撕裂墓穴，无数根系被炸成齑粉，根须在烈焰中燃烧。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}And then, for the first time in centuries, the deepest levels of Zarkov's root system were flooded with light. The explosion ripped apart the tomb from the inside, blasting many of the roots to pieces and setting still more ablaze.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}接着，数个世纪以来的第一次，扎尔科夫最深层的根系被光芒淹没。爆炸从内部撕裂墓穴，无数根系被炸成齑粉，根须在烈焰中燃烧。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Und dann wurden die tiefsten Bereiche von Zarkovs Wurzelsystem zum ersten Mal seit Jahrhunderten von Licht durchflutet. Die Explosion riss das Grab von innen heraus in Stücke, zerstörte viele der Wurzeln und steckte noch mehr von ihnen in Brand.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}And then, for the first time in centuries, the deepest levels of Zarkov's root system were flooded with light. The explosion ripped apart the tomb from the inside, blasting many of the roots to pieces and setting still more ablaze.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Und dann wurden die tiefsten Bereiche von Zarkovs Wurzelsystem zum ersten Mal seit Jahrhunderten von Licht durchflutet. Die Explosion riss das Grab von innen heraus in Stücke, zerstörte viele der Wurzeln und steckte noch mehr von ihnen in Brand.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Sonra, yüzyıllardır ilk kez Zarkov'un kök sisteminin en derin seviyeleri ışıkla doldu. Patlama; mezarı içeriden parçaladı, köklerin çoğunu paramparça etti ve daha fazlasını ateşe verdi.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}And then, for the first time in centuries, the deepest levels of Zarkov's root system were flooded with light. The explosion ripped apart the tomb from the inside, blasting many of the roots to pieces and setting still more ablaze.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Sonra, yüzyıllardır ilk kez Zarkov'un kök sisteminin en derin seviyeleri ışıkla doldu. Patlama; mezarı içeriden parçaladı, köklerin çoğunu paramparça etti ve daha fazlasını ateşe verdi.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Alors, pour la première fois depuis des siècles, les profondeurs du système radiculaire de Zarkov furent baignées de lumière. L'explosion déchira le tombeau de l'intérieur, réduisant la plupart des racines en charpie et enflammant le reste.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}And then, for the first time in centuries, the deepest levels of Zarkov's root system were flooded with light. The explosion ripped apart the tomb from the inside, blasting many of the roots to pieces and setting still more ablaze.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Alors, pour la première fois depuis des siècles, les profondeurs du système radiculaire de Zarkov furent baignées de lumière. L'explosion déchira le tombeau de l'intérieur, réduisant la plupart des racines en charpie et enflammant le reste.{/n}
